connectors.name: datadog
connectors.description: Datadog connector — metrics via the v1 query API and logs via the v2 logs search API. The first optional, hub-installable connector.

versions.changelog: Initial release: metrics + logs, API/Application key auth, service discovery via the service tag.

connectors.name: elasticsearch
connectors.description: Elasticsearch connector — logs via _search and log-derived metrics (doc/error rate) via date_histogram aggregations. ECS-style fields, API-key or basic auth.

versions.changelog: Initial release: _search logs + date_histogram log-derived metrics, service-name aggregation discovery, API-key/basic auth, ES_INDEX pattern.

connectors.name: grafana
connectors.description: Grafana connector — metrics from a Prometheus-compatible datasource and logs from a Loki datasource, queried through Grafana's datasource proxy behind Grafana auth.

versions.changelog: Initial release: Prometheus-proxied metrics + Loki-proxied logs via Grafana datasource proxy, auto datasource-UID resolution, service-account token auth.

connectors.name: kubernetes
connectors.description: Watches a Kubernetes cluster (in-cluster or via kubeconfig) and exposes pods, nodes, deployments, replicasets and namespaces as an infrastructure topology graph. Edges: RUNS_ON (pod→node), OWNED_BY (pod→rs→deployment), IN_NAMESPACE. Built on @kubernetes/client-node Informers — no polling.

versions.changelog: Initial release: watch-based topology graph (pods, nodes, deployments, replicasets, namespaces) with incremental change events. Bundled with the server image — no install step.

connectors.name: loki
connectors.description: LogQL-based logs backend. Service discovery from log streams and label-scoped log queries.

versions.changelog: Bundled with the server image — no install step. Listed for discoverability and to anchor the catalog format.

connectors.name: prometheus
connectors.description: PromQL-based metrics backend. Service discovery, default metric set, and ad-hoc range/instant queries.

versions.changelog: Bundled with the server image — no install step. Listed for discoverability and to anchor the catalog format.

connectors.name: tempo
connectors.description: Grafana Tempo connector — OTLP-native tracing backend. Surfaces trace-derived service latency via the TraceQL search API and derives a service-graph (CALLS edges) by walking cross-service parent/child spans across a recent-trace sample.

versions.changelog: Adds topology capability: derives CALLS edges between services from a sampled batch of recent Tempo traces (default 50). Snapshots memoized for 30s. Sample size configurable via source config (`traceSample`).
Initial release: trace-derived service latency via Tempo TraceQL search, service discovery from resource.service.name tag, optional Bearer auth.
